nodes.label: Dr. Colin Ross
nodes.summary: Canadian psychiatrist; moved to US. Author of 'The CIA Doctors' — investigates psychiatrists who were employed by CIA for MK-Ultra-style mind-control experiments creating dissociated personalities, Manchurian candidates, couriers, and spies.

sources.quote: Canadian psychiatrist; author of 'The CIA Doctors'

nodes.label: Lee Harvey Oswald (MK-Ultra subject)
nodes.summary: Alleged sole JFK assassin; per Colin Ross's investigation, was likely an MK-Ultra subject — consistent with repeated memory lapses under interrogation.

sources.quote: Per Ross: JFK assassin was likely an MK-Ultra subject

nodes.label: Charles Manson (MK subject)
nodes.summary: American cult leader; per Colin Ross's investigation, was an MK-Ultra subject — explaining the mind-control hallmarks of his followers' horrific acts.

sources.quote: Per Ross's investigation: Manson was an MK-Ultra subject

nodes.label: Project MK-Ultra
nodes.summary: CIA Project MK-Ultra (1953-1973) — 149 subprojects using ~120 different drugs for mind control, electric shock, dissociative-identity-disorder creation, Manchurian Candidate development. Paper trail 'goes dark in 1975 with reform.'

sources.timestamp_end: CIA mind-control program 1953-1973 using ~120 drugs + electric shock

nodes.label: Tuskegee Syphilis Study (1932+)
nodes.summary: US Public Health Service experiment started 1932 — 'side effects of syphilis in the male' in Tuskegee context; 'all these top medical people were off on it.' Used as precedent for MK-Ultra ethical collapse.

sources.timestamp_end: Unethical US Public Health Service syphilis experiment on Black men

nodes.label: The CIA Doctors
nodes.summary: Dr. Colin Ross's book documenting the psychiatrists who worked for CIA on MK-Ultra and related mind-control programs.

sources.timestamp_end: Colin Ross's documentation of CIA-psychiatrist collaboration

nodes.label: Ross recounts being escorted inside a classified Northern Virginia government facility by a DIA cont
nodes.summary: Ross recounts being escorted inside a classified Northern Virginia government facility by a DIA contact; shown documents for all 149 MK-Ultra projects. Cab driver from Afghanistan unknowingly provided cover.

sources.quote: I was down in Northern Virginia for a conference on MK Ultra. It turns out the taxi driver is from Afghanistan. The guy gives me a piece of paper. Walk over here through another door. Bunch of guys in uniform. The woman comes down, keys in a code. Another door, secure line DIA only. I got to read documents. A cart with all the 149 MK Ultra projects.
